title: poa trivialis f. prorepens
intro: Poa trivialis f. prorepens, also known as creeping meadow-grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Poa trivialis f. prorepens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in water to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
